channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Beatrice Elachi's Kajiado Rural Home and Francis Atwoli's Influence
item.description: Former Nairobi Speaker Beatrice Elachi gave a rare tour of her Kajiado country home during a TV show, revealing she owned the property since 2010. She credited COTU boss Francis Atwoli for inspiring h...

item.title: ANC Expels Councillor Over Alleged DA Spying Allegations
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) in the eThekwini Region has expelled Ward 8 councillor Marco Mbambo, accusing him of spying for the Democratic Alliance (DA) and planning to defect to the oppositio...

item.title: Lovi Poe Shares How Motherhood Has Made Her More Intentional
item.description: Lovi Poe, known for her roles in Philippine entertainment, recently opened up about how becoming a mother has transformed her approach to life and career. In an exclusive interview, she emphasized tha...

item.title: FG strengthens anti-bullying measures to ensure safe learning environments
item.description: The federal government has ramped up its efforts to combat bullying in schools, encouraging students to report incidents without fear. This renewed campaign is part of the Safe School Initiative, aime...

item.title: Sita Sargeant's Award Recognition Sparks Growth for Her Historical Women's Tours Business
item.description: Sita Sargeant, founder of She Shapes History, saw her business and cause take off after being named ACT's Young Australian of the Year. The award catalyzed explosive growth, with attendance on her wal...

item.title: Tens of thousands flee wildfires in France as Spain declares national emergency
item.description: Tens of thousands of people have been forced to flee their homes in southwest France due to devastating wildfires, while Spain has declared a national emergency as blazes merge near Madrid. The fires,...

item.title: Wildfires displace thousands in Europe
item.description: Wildfires have forced thousands of residents to evacuate their homes across parts of Europe, according to recent reports. The fires, which have spread rapidly due to high temperatures and strong winds...

item.title: Tomorrowland 2026 Implements Firework Restrictions Due to Wildfire Concerns
item.description: Tomorrowland 2026 has implemented restrictions on 'large-scale' fireworks and limited pyrotechnics for its second weekend due to wildfire fears. Belgium remains under a 'Code Orange' wildfire risk lev...

item.title: Centre and CJP fail to reach agreement over NEET protest demands as Supreme Court schedules hearing on police action
item.description: The deadlock between the Centre and the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) over the alleged NEET paper leak continued after a second round of discussions failed to produce a final agreement. During a nearly ...

item.title: A Global Art Conspiracy: The Looting of Cambodian Cultural Heritage
item.description: Matthew Campbell's *The Man Who Stole the Gods* recounts the shocking story of Douglas Latchford, an Englishman who exploited Cambodia's cultural heritage during its turbulent history. Latchford, init...

item.title: The Avalanches Collaborate with Karen O on Haunting Single 'Blue Shadows'
item.description: The Avalanches have collaborated with Yeah Yeah Yeahs’ frontwoman Karen O on the melancholic single 'Blue Shadows', which draws inspiration from an early-1980s Italo disco track by Blue Gas. The song,...

item.title: Kakamega MCAs Leave ODM to Back Sifuna's Presidential Bid
item.description: A section of Kakamega County Assembly members has quit the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) party, accusing national and county leaders of state capture. Led by Benard Mulama (Bokanda) from Lumakanda ...

item.title: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty to Affray in Legal Case Involving Bottle Attack
item.description: R&B singer Chris Brown has pleaded guilty to affray at Southwark Crown Court in London, marking a partial resolution to a legal case that began with an alleged nightclub attack in 2023. The 37-year-ol...

item.title: Woman receives life sentence for orchestrating lover’s murder and assault on his mother
item.description: Antoinette Maritz, 37, has been sentenced to life imprisonment for the premeditated murder of her partner Wayne Henderson, along with 15 years for attempted murder, 15 years for robbery with aggravati...

item.title: Naira strengthens with improved dollar liquidity and rising foreign reserves
item.description: The Nigerian naira showed resilience against the US dollar in both official and parallel markets, driven by enhanced foreign exchange liquidity and growing external reserves. In the official market, t...

item.title: U.S.-Iran military conflict escalates with airstrikes, oil prices surge
item.description: The article details the ongoing military conflict between the United States and Iran, highlighting recent airstrikes by the U.S. military targeting Iranian military assets. The strikes, part of a 13th...

item.title: Senate President Gatchalian Ensures Security for Hontiveros Amid Online Threats
item.description: Senate President Sherwin Gatchalian has assured security for Senator Risa Hontiveros following online death threats and negative comments. He emphasized coordination with intelligence agencies to addr...

item.title: Mitch McConnell's Extended Absence and Senate Reactions
item.description: The article details Senator Mitch McConnell's prolonged absence from Senate activities, with his health issues and reliance on security detail becoming a focal point. Senior Democrats, including Dick ...

item.title: Senator Roger Marshall Discusses Parental Anger Over Fox News Influence
item.description: U.S. Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS), a prominent MAGA supporter and Trump backer, recently expressed frustration over the anger directed at him by Republican voters, including his own parents. During a...

item.title: Southern Africa Unites to Host AFCON 2028 with Joint Bid
item.description: Southern Africa has taken a significant step towards hosting the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) 2028 after South Africa, Botswana, and Zimbabwe submitted a joint bid to organize the tournament. The col...
